context: For Part 2, reveal the unidentifiable object as part of a mysterious, unexplainable structure or device, found near the bodies. Focus on the bizarre nature of the injuries that medical reports revealed—unnatural force, similar to a car crash, but with no external bruising. Introduce local legends or whispers of 'mountain spirits' or 'military experiments' as potential leads, building on the unknown source of the terror and radiation. End on a new, shocking piece of evidence or a cryptic document.
